name: Stuffed Goose
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooking apples, peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove giblets and neck from goose; reserve for other uses. Rinse the goose thoroughly with water and pat dry.
3. Prick the skin of the goose at 2-inch intervals using a fork.
4. Combine the cooked rice and the remaining ingredients (apples, raisins, onion, rosemary, salt, pepper) in a large bowl. Stir well to ensure all components are evenly distributed.
5. Spoon the mixture into the cavity of the goose, ensuring it is thoroughly filled.
6. Secure the goose with skewers and truss it tightly. Place the bird breast side up on a rack in a roasting pan.
7. Insert a meat thermometer into the thigh, making sure it does not touch the bone.
8. Bake at 350°F for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, or until the meat thermometer registers 185 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Once cooked, place the goose on a serving platter. Garnish with parsley and orange slices if desired.
Yield: 5 to 7 servings.
